channel.title: Comments for page "The Great Site-87 Bakesale"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Great Site-87 Bakesale"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
what did i just read?

I mean I loved it but what just happend?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I am once again reminded why S&C Plastics is one of my favorite canons.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I never get tired of S&C Plastics tales, and this one's a doozy. :D

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
That… was incredibly weird.

One nitpick, I thought "Type Green" was the GOC name, not what the Foundation used? Though I suppose the two groups have been cooperating long enough that colloquial use would probably slip between them. Especially in a site literally founded near their greatest cooperative fuckup.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I meant Henry VIII; he was the Founder of the Anglican church, and protestants vs Catholics, etc. Will fix.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I enjoyed this thoroughly, but why would an English Catholic have had any issue speaking with Henry VII shortly before his death?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: In any other context I might have chewed this out for toxic levels of lolFoundation. But that only means that it is both effective and wickedly funny within the context of Sloth's Pit.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"I'm sorry, but what."

Never have I seen a tale sum itself up quite so perfectly. +1

item.title: It is a far, far dumber thing that I do, than I have ever done.
item.content:encoded:
Welp. I said I would put it up after entries were closed, and I am keeping my promise, dagnabbit.

I've wanted to look into the past of S & C Plastics for a while now, and this is an experiment with some of the characters from previous eras, with a does of silliness.

Believe it or not, this is inspired by a series of tweets. Specifically, this one that was prompted by an exchange between the excellent Nick Nocturne of Night Mind fame and Al Bruno III of the Night Blogger podcast. It was such a stupid idea that I had to make something of it, and this is it. :^V

Thank you to everyone who has looked at this on chat. Now if you'll excuse me, my sweet tooth is aching.
